LAW AND MOTION 301, A R G U E D; JUDGE BUSCH DISCLOSED THAT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, IS A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY AND NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION REGARDING POSSESSION- GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT NEXTARTS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT NEXTARTS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECCESARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. NEXTARTS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A JAMES ROBERTSON, III; CLERKS: DLOK/VMU; REPORTER: GENA EALES CSR 	176 (206)
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: FEES PAID.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT
